title: PepsiCo and 4 Other ‘Low-Volatility' Stocks That Can Beat the Market
text: Pepsi's parent company, household-products maker Church & Dwight, and three others have consistent earnings despite the condition of the economy.

title: 7 Recession-Resistant Stocks to Buy to Prepare for the Worst
text: While recent moves higher imply brewing confidence, the still-poor underlying conditions bolster these recession-resistant stocks to buy. The post 7 Recession-Resistant Stocks to Buy to Prepare for the Worst appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Gains on Demand, Pricing Amid Cost Woes
text: Church & Dwight (CHD) has been gaining on solid demand trends, with its brands getting a boost from innovation and buyouts. Also, the company's pricing has been aiding amid cost inflation.
